item.title: About me
item.description: Until I find a better place to put it in I’m adding the copyright notice to comply with the MIT license here: https://www.abhaynikam.me…
item.content:encoded:
Until I find a better place to put it in I’m adding the copyright notice to comply with the MIT license here:

https://www.abhaynikam.me/pages/about/

I’ll be also using this as a TODO:

  • Add search.js to gatsby
  • Maybe add tags
  • Find a better place for the copyright notice
  • Maybe fork the main project and pull request the searcher
  • Try out embed youtube

item.title: Testing embed
item.content:encoded:
apostrophes

`youtube:https://www.youtube.com/embed/2Xc9gXyf2G4`

no apostrophes

youtube:https://www.youtube.com/embed/2Xc9gXyf2G4

complete copypasta

youtube:https://www.youtube.com/embed/2Xc9gXyf2G4
